allow: Bash(git -c http.postBuffer=524288000 -c core.compression=1 push origin main --verbose)
Bash(timeout 600 bash -c 'for attempt in {1..3}; do echo ""Attempt $attempt...""; git push origin main && break || sleep 5; done')
Bash(for file in fig1_dataset_overview.py fig2_preprocessing_pipeline.py fig3_ica_components.py fig4_epoch_analysis.py fig6_summary_dashboard.py)
